characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, brown complexion, short dark hair. He has a clean-shaven face with standard features.
characters.wardrobe: Wearing a light grey hoodie and dark shorts.

characters.appearance: Female humanoid robot. She has a realistic human-like face with fair complexion and long dark hair. Her body is a white and grey mechanical shell with visible joints, paneling, and subtle blue glowing accents.
characters.wardrobe: No clothing; her exterior is her mechanical body.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मेरा हाथ पकड़ो। [Hold my hand.]
Character B says: Hold my hand.
Character A says: Cupboard में छुप जाओ। [Hide in the cupboard.]
Character B says: Hide in the cupboard.
Character A says: सोने जाओ। [Go to bed.]
Character B says: Go to bed.
Character A says: मुझे नहीं पता। [I don't know.]
Character B says: I don't know.
Character B says: English बोलना अब हो गया है बिल्कुल आसान। [Speaking English has now become very easy.]
Character B says: अब मेरे साथ बिना डरे practice करो। [Now practice with me without fear.]
Character B says: Interview हो या दोस्तों से बात, रोज़ practice करो। [Whether it's an interview or talking to friends, practice daily.]
Character B says: रोज़ सिर्फ 10 minute [Just 10 minutes daily]
Character B says: तुम्हारी fluency और confidence दोनों बढ़ेंगे। [Your fluency and confidence will both increase.]
Character B says: Supernova App download करो। [Download the Supernova App.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core learning loop by showing a simple translation exercise between the user and the AI.
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, low-pressure learning environment.
- Introduces Supernova's value proposition of fear-free, daily practice for real-world situations, replacing the competitor's unrealistic 30-day fluency guarantee.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मेरा हाथ पकड़ो। (Hold my hand.)
Hold my hand.
Cupboard में छुप जाओ। (Hide in the cupboard.)
Hide in the cupboard.
सोने जाओ। (Go to bed.)
Go to bed.
मुझे नहीं पता। (I don't know.)
I don't know.
English बोलना अब हो गया है बिल्कुल आसान। (Speaking English has now become very easy.)
अब मेरे साथ बिना डरे practice करो। (Now practice with me without fear.)
Interview हो या दोस्तों से बात, रोज़ practice करो। (Whether it's an interview or talking to friends, practice daily.)
रोज़ सिर्फ 10 minute (Just 10 minutes daily)
तुम्हारी fluency और confidence दोनों बढ़ेंगे। (Your fluency and confidence will both increase.)
Supernova App download करो। (Download the Supernova App.)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Daily lessons देखो और मेरे साथ बोलकर practice करो। [Watch daily lessons and practice speaking with me.]
Character B says: मैं तुम्हारी AI Tutor हूँ [I am your AI Tutor]
Character B says: 24 घंटे available [Available 24 hours]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the core features of the Supernova app, specifically daily lessons and the AI tutor.
- Reassures the user with the 24/7 availability of the AI coach, removing time constraints and anxiety.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Daily lessons देखो और मेरे साथ बोलकर practice करो। (Watch daily lessons and practice speaking with me.)
मैं तुम्हारी AI Tutor हूँ 24 घंटे available (I am your AI Tutor available 24 hours)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: जब मन करे तब practice करो। [Practice whenever you want.]
Character B says: हमारे affordable plans के साथ आज ही शुरू करो। [Start today with our affordable plans.]
Character B says: Install button पर click करो [Click on the install button]
Character B says: Supernova App download करो। [Download the Supernova App.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Drives the call to action by emphasizing flexibility and accessible pricing.
- Replaces the competitor's specific 1-rupee trial with Supernova's broader 'affordable plans' messaging.
- Directs the user to click the install button and download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
जब मन करे तब practice करो। (Practice whenever you want.)
हमारे affordable plans के साथ आज ही शुरू करो। (Start today with our affordable plans.)
Install button पर click करो (Click on the install button)
Supernova App download करो। (Download the Supernova App.)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: बिल्कुल देर मत करो, अभी install now पर click करो और Supernova App download कर लो। [Don't delay at all, click on install now right away and download the Supernova App.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a clear, visual end card with the brand name and CTA.
- Creates a sense of urgency from the learner's perspective to install the app immediately.

- Displays standard legal disclaimers regarding endorsements and guaranteed results.
- Protects the brand from liability while maintaining transparency.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Supernova kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai Supernova kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.

brand_swaps_detected.competitor_brand: এক মাসের মধ্যেই তুমি fluent হয়ে যাবে (fluent within a month)
brand_swaps_detected.supernova_swap: तुम्हारी fluency और confidence दोनों बढ़ेंगे (fluency and confidence will increase)
